case_title: JUSTIN GUIDRY VS. THE GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-28-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUSTIN GUIDRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL LLC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUIDRY, JUSTIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUIDRY, JUSTIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC.
